ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component (e.g., resistor, capacitor, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the condition (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_conditions" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition associated with the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id", "condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each range */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the range belongs to */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units used to measure the parameter */,
  "nominal_value" REAL /* Nominal or typical value for the parameter */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance or acceptable deviation from the nominal value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the range was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the range was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the reference belongs to */,
  "reference_number" REAL /* Reference number for the parameter */,
  "reference_source" TEXT /* Source of the reference (e.g., datasheet, manual, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reference was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being versioned */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component/parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
